MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Denise Pritchard, for Basma H. Elkarra, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises that it is not convinced that diligent efforts have been made to locate possible heirs and intends to continue this matter to allow counsel to supplement the petition. No objection is presented to the preceding and the matter is continued to Dec-29-2025 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Robles. Not Reported.
